title: Auto Complete
description:
Adds an auto complete feature that auto completes words when TAB key is pressed.
Available for 🇺🇸🇷🇺🇵🇹🇨🇳
body:
Adds an auto complete feature that auto completes words when pressed TAB key. This uses multiple libraries with ~**1,000,000** words across them 

Available for English 🇺🇸, Russian 🇷🇺, Portuguese 🇵🇹 and Chinese 🇨🇳 speaking players!

![image](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/UV1P73r5/images/dd9625a5753227403388227227cb51c2c917a4d8.png)
